creator: dyeske@yahoo.com
text:
I approve of my own pr

On Tue, 3 Jul 2007 06:50:14 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of graphics/yafray,
>
> Please note that PR ports/114232 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114232
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
